answer: The corpus contains 3 works by Allama Iqbal, all from his Bang-E-Dara collection (The Call of the Marching Bell), published in 1924 in Urdu: (1) Bang-E-Dara Part 1 (slug: allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c) with 44 chapters, (2) Bang-E-Dara Part 2 (slug: allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c) with 28 chapters, and (3) Bang-E-Dara Part 3 (slug: allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-3-cc61e8) with 28 chapters.
